shared_attributes.rendering: top layer, above all game elements

context.game: Pico Echo - virtual pet cockatiel game
context.role: Popup menu with 3 care action buttons: Feed, Clean, Pet
context.screen_position: Bottom-right corner when visible, 3 buttons at (96,108), (108,108), (120,108)
context.usage_scenario: Appears when player taps screen (outside Echo). Shows 3 care options. Each button triggers corresponding action if not on cooldown. Grayed out when on cooldown.

visual_specification.shape: 3 square buttons, 8x8px each, side by side

animation.description: 2 states per button: active (colored icon) and disabled (gray). No animation, instant state change.

visual_specification.details: Button 1 (Feed): Seed icon, 3x3px #FFA300 oval at center. Button 2 (Clean): Broom icon, 5x6px #C2C3C7 simple L-shape. Button 3 (Pet): Hand icon, 5x6px #FFCCAA simple hand silhouette. Background: semi-transparent #1D2B53 (50% opacity). Disabled state: icon becomes #5F574F (dark gray). Buttons positioned at x=96, 108, 120, all at y=108.

relationships.shared_with: Icon colors match related game elements
relationships.differences_from: happiness_bar: popup vs always visible, buttons vs bar. status_bubble: player-triggered vs system-triggered.

explicit_negations: Buttons do not highlight on hover
No sound wave or effect indicators
Buttons do not grow or shrink on press
